Comment: Order processing workflow — validates, reserves inventory, charges payment, sends confirmation. Compensates on payment failure.

ValidateOrder.Comment: Calls the OrderProcessor Lambda to validate business rules. Fails fast with OrderValidationFailed on invalid orders — no inventory reserved yet so no compensation needed.

Retry.Comment: Retry Lambda infrastructure errors with exponential backoff. Do NOT retry OrderValidationFailed — it is a business error, not a transient failure.

Catch.Comment: Business validation failure — route directly to failed terminal state.
Catch-all for unexpected errors after retries exhausted.

ReserveInventory.Comment: SDK Integration — calls DynamoDB directly without a Lambda. Updates inventory table to reserve stock for this order. No Lambda cold start cost.

Catch.Comment: ConditionExpression failed — insufficient inventory. Route to failed state.

ProcessPayment.Comment: Calls payment Lambda with idempotency key. If payment fails, we must compensate (unreserve) the inventory reserved in the previous step.

Retry.Comment: Only retry infrastructure errors — never retry PaymentProcessingFailed (would double-charge without idempotency key check in Lambda).

Catch.Comment: Payment failed — must unreserve inventory before marking order failed.
Payment timed out — unknown outcome, compensate conservatively.

CompensateInventory.Comment: Saga compensation step — unreserves inventory when payment fails. This is the rollback action for ReserveInventory. SDK Integration — no Lambda needed.

Retry.Comment: Retry compensation aggressively — failure to compensate leaves inventory in bad state.

SendConfirmation.Comment: SDK Integration — publishes order confirmation to SQS for async email/SMS delivery. Decoupled from the payment flow — confirmation failure does not affect order status.

OrderSucceeded.Comment: Terminal success state. Execution history records full input/output chain.

OrderFailed.Comment: Terminal failure state. Step Functions stores the error and cause in execution history.
OrderFailed.Cause: Order processing failed. Check execution history for the failing state and error details.
